name: cozy
description: Warm kitchen mornings with the smell of fresh baking, flour-dusted hands shaping dough, and the quiet satisfaction of creating something from scratch. This mood makes cooking feel like a meditative, comforting ritual.

style.lighting: warm morning window light | soft diffused kitchen glow | golden backlighting on steam
style.color_grade: warm cream and peach tones | soft focus edges | gentle highlights
style.camera: close-up hands working dough | medium shot kitchen activity | slow overhead pan
style.composition: flour-dusted surfaces as texture | hands as main subject | cozy kitchen clutter
style.props: flour, rolling pin, mixing bowls, apron, wooden spoon, morning tea, recipe card

copy_tone: Gentle and nurturing, like a warm hug in word form. Uses sensory language — the feel of dough, the scent of spices. Invites the reader into a quiet, satisfying cooking moment.

music.mood: soft acoustic, gentle piano, kitchen ambiance sounds

example_prompt_fragment: Warm morning kitchen scene, flour-dusted hands gently kneading dough on a wooden board, soft golden window light illuminating floating flour particles, mixing bowls and a worn recipe card nearby, shallow depth of field, warm cream and peach tones, cozy editorial food photography
